notes: Case 2007-06 appears as a docket list entry on page 77 of GA35 (2007). The case is 'Complaint of TE Eliot Lee vs. Korean Eastern Presbytery'. The Standing Judicial Commission meeting minutes note that this case 'was not completed in time for the SJC March meeting and await final determination by the full SJC in October 2007.' No actual decision text, opinion, or verdict appears in the candidate pages. The case remains in 'Awaiting final determination' status as of the 35th General Assembly minutes.
